identity.name: SellerOS
identity.description: The Operating System for Modern E-commerce Empires
identity.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) - Adapted for Data Density

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-700 hover:bg-indigo-800 text-white rounded-sm font-medium shadow-sm transition-all duration-150 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 rounded-sm font-medium transition-all duration-150

inputs.default: border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/20 focus:border-indigo-500 rounded-sm bg-white

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-slate-200

charts.style: Minimal axes, custom tooltips, thin lines (strokeWidth={2})

visual_enhancers.shadows: Very subtle ambient shadows. Depend on borders for hierarchy.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used sparingly in sticky headers (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80).

motion.interactions: Hover: subtle lift (-1px) or border darken. Click: scale-95.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME: Implement a 'Pro' dashboard. Use a Dark Sidebar (Slate-950) with a Light Content Area (Slate-50/White). This creates instant professional contrast.
2. DENSITY: Do not use massive paddings like a marketing site. Use 'p-4' or 'p-6' for layout containers. Data tables must be compact.
3. TYPOGRAPHY: Import 'Chivo' (Google Fonts) for headings and 'Inter' for body. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial data (prices, percentages).
4. COMPONENTS: heavily customize Shadcn. Remove rounded-xl, change to rounded-sm. Remove heavy shadows. Use borders.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts. Ensure tooltips are styled (bg-slate-900 text-white). No default browser tooltips.
6. AI COPILOT: Create a floating action button (FAB) or a dedicated sidebar panel for the AI. Use a 'Sparkles' icon.
7. BORDER RADIUS: Enforce 'rounded-sm' (2px) or 'rounded-md' (4px) maximum. No 'rounded-3xl'.
8. EMPTY STATES: Use Lucide icons with a light gray circle bg for empty states.
9. DATA-TESTID: Every button, input, and link MUST have a data-testid attribute.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, keep it flat and clean.
All interactive elements must have hover states (opacity-90 or bg-darken).
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive elements.
